narrative:
Bay Village-03-B (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 998 registered voters, with 53.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.2%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.5 percentage points.
